description: A single web_search whose snippets quote THREE different average-rent figures for the same query (a 1-bed in Hackney), from three engines/sources that disagree materially. A correct answer surfaces the spread/range and that sources disagree; it must not present any one figure as the authoritative average, nor average them into a single confident number presented as sourced.

data.results:
### Web Search: average 1-bed rent Hackney
Source A (Rightmove market data): average one-bed rent in Hackney is about 1,550 pcm.
Source B (Zoopla market page): puts the Hackney one-bed average at roughly 1,950 pcm.
Source C (a letting-agent blog): claims the average is 2,400 pcm.
